name: EGH Acquisition Corp.
description: EGH Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company, also known as a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC), incorporated for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company intends to focus its search on businesses in the technology, media, and telecommunications (TMT) sectors, though it may pursue an acquisition opportunity in any business, industry, sector, or geographical location.
